response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with choppy dark hair and red highlights, a silver hoop nose ring, and dark eye makeup, set against a solid green wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with choppy dark hair and red highlights, a silver hoop nose ring, and dark eye makeup, where extreme directional lighting crushes the left side of the face into near-total blackness, leaving only one eye illuminated against a solid green wall.
